DX-MATCH.citation: Local rule placeholder: diagnosis-to-drug-class indication per licensed formulary

PREG-PREFERRED.citation: Local rule placeholder: relatively preferred agent in pregnancy per perinatal guideline

LACT-AVOID.citation: Local rule placeholder: lactation contraindication / infant-risk reference

LACT-SPECIALIST.citation: Local rule placeholder: lactation risk-benefit guidance (e.g. LactMed)

RENAL-AVOID.citation: Local rule placeholder: renal dosing / contraindication per renal drug handbook

RENAL-DOSEADJ.citation: Local rule placeholder: renal dose-adjustment per licensed monograph

HEPATIC-AVOID.citation: Local rule placeholder: hepatic contraindication / specialist dosing reference

ADHERENCE-LAI.citation: Local rule placeholder: long-acting injectable in non-adherence guidance

PASTRESP-PARTIAL.citation: Local rule placeholder: prior-partial-response-guided selection principle

PASTRESP-FAIL.citation: Local rule placeholder: prior-failure/intolerance avoidance principle

PASTRESP-ADEQ-NONRESP.citation: Osser DN. Psychopharmacology Algorithms: Clinical Guidance from the Psychopharmacology Algorithm Project at the Harvard South Shore Psychiatry Residency Program. 2020; adequate nonresponse decision nodes.

PASTRESP-AE.citation: Local rule placeholder: documented prior adverse-effect avoidance

SUICIDE-OD.citation: Local rule placeholder: overdose-toxicity / quantity-to-dispense guidance in suicide risk

MDD-TRD-LITHIUM-AUGMENT.citation: Osser DN. Psychopharmacology Algorithms: Clinical Guidance from the Psychopharmacology Algorithm Project at the Harvard South Shore Psychiatry Residency Program. 2020; treatment-resistant depression augmentation branch.

PSY-CLOZAPINE-TRS-CONDITIONAL.citation: Osser DN. Psychopharmacology Algorithms: Clinical Guidance from the Psychopharmacology Algorithm Project at the Harvard South Shore Psychiatry Residency Program. 2020; treatment-resistance threshold with efficacy-trial qualification.

PSY-CLOZAPINE-EFFICACY-GATE.citation: Osser DN. Psychopharmacology Algorithms: Clinical Guidance from the Psychopharmacology Algorithm Project at the Harvard South Shore Psychiatry Residency Program. 2020; risperidone/olanzapine/FGA trial before clozapine qualification.

PSY-NEGATIVE-MIRTAZAPINE-ADJUNCT.citation: Local rule placeholder: mirtazapine is adjunctive and does not replace antipsychotic treatment in schizophrenia.

GERI-ANTIPSYCHOTIC-ELDERLY.citation: Local rule placeholder: cautious antipsychotic use in older adults (geriatric prescribing guidance)

GERI-SEDATION-FALLS.citation: Local rule placeholder: sedation/fall risk with sedating agents in older adults (Beers/STOPP criteria)

SEIZURE-CLOZAPINE.citation: Local rule placeholder: clozapine dose-dependent seizure-threshold lowering (product label)

SUICIDE-OD-GRADED.citation: Local rule placeholder: limited dispensing/means restriction in active suicidality (suicide prevention guideline)

DDI-LITHIUM-LEVEL.citation: Local rule placeholder: NSAIDs/ACEi/ARB/thiazide raise lithium levels (interaction reference)

DDI-CLOZAPINE-MARROW.citation: Local rule placeholder: additive myelosuppression with clozapine + carbamazepine (interaction reference)

DDI-SEROTONIN-MAOI.citation: Local rule placeholder: SSRI + MAOI/linezolid serotonin syndrome, contraindicated without washout (interaction reference)

DDI-SEROTONIN-OTHER.citation: Local rule placeholder: additive serotonergic risk with tramadol/triptans/St John's wort (interaction reference)

DDI-MAOI-SEROTONERGIC.citation: Local rule placeholder: MAOI plus serotonergic medicine interaction and drug-specific washout requirements.

DDI-SEDATIVE-RESPIRATORY.citation: Local rule placeholder: additive respiratory depression, overdose, sedation, and falls risk with gabapentinoids/benzodiazepines plus CNS depressants.

GAD-SNRI-STEP.citation: NICE CG113, SSRI/SNRI sequencing; Osser DN (2020), GAD algorithm.

GAD-PREGABALIN-LATER.citation: NICE CG113 recommendation 1.2.25; Osser DN (2020), GAD algorithm.

GAD-PARTIAL-AUGMENT.citation: Osser DN. Psychopharmacology Algorithms (2020), GAD partial-response augmentation discussion.

GAD-PARTIAL-AUGMENT-WEAK.citation: NICE CG113 treatment-refractory GAD specialist-care recommendations; local evidence review required.

GAD-BUPROPION-LIMITED.citation: Osser DN. Psychopharmacology Algorithms (2020), GAD alternative node; current local guideline review required.

GAD-SGA-REFRACTORY.citation: Osser DN. Psychopharmacology Algorithms (2020), refractory GAD nodes.

GAD-SGA-SPECIALIST.citation: NICE CG113 recommendation 1.2.27 and specialist step-4 care: do not offer antipsychotics for GAD in primary care.

SAD-SECOND-MEDICATION.citation: NICE CG159 recommendation 1.3.10; Osser DN (2020), social anxiety medication sequence.

SAD-MAOI-LATER.citation: NICE CG159 later pharmacological sequence; Osser DN (2020), social anxiety MAOI node.

SAD-MAOI-SAFETY.citation: Licensed MAOI monograph and local interaction/dietary safety protocol required.

SAD-WITHDRAWAL-BURDEN.citation: NICE CG159 medication adverse-effect and discontinuation recommendations.

SAD-FLUVOXAMINE-INTERACTIONS.citation: Licensed fluvoxamine monograph and validated drug-interaction reference required.

SAD-BENZO-SUBSTANCE.citation: NICE CG159 non-routine benzodiazepine recommendation plus local substance-use/dependence guidance.

PTSD-NEXT-TRIAL.citation: VA/DoD PTSD CPG (2023) medication evidence table; Osser DN (2020), PTSD sequence.

PTSD-PAROXETINE-BURDEN.citation: VA/DoD PTSD CPG (2023) plus licensed paroxetine monograph and perinatal guidance.

PTSD-PRAZOSIN-NIGHTMARES.citation: VA/DoD PTSD CPG (2023): prazosin suggested for PTSD-associated nightmares; Osser DN (2020), PTSD sleep node.

PTSD-PRAZOSIN-NOT-GLOBAL.citation: VA/DoD PTSD CPG (2023): prazosin suggested against for treatment of global PTSD symptoms.

PTSD-TRAZODONE-SLEEP.citation: Osser DN. Psychopharmacology Algorithms (2020), PTSD sleep-treatment node.

PTSD-TRAZODONE-LIMITED.citation: VA/DoD PTSD CPG (2023) evidence review plus licensed trazodone monograph.

PTSD-MIRTAZAPINE-UNCERTAIN.citation: VA/DoD PTSD CPG (2023): insufficient evidence for or against mirtazapine for PTSD; Osser DN (2020), PTSD chapter.

OCD-SECOND-SSRI.citation: NICE CG31 poor-response sequence; Osser DN (2020), OCD second-SRI node.

OCD-CLOMIPRAMINE-LATER.citation: NICE CG31 recommendation 1.5.5.3; Osser DN (2020), OCD clomipramine node.

OCD-CLOMIPRAMINE-SAFETY.citation: NICE CG31 clomipramine ECG/overdose precautions and licensed monograph.

OCD-PAROXETINE-BURDEN.citation: NICE CG31 antidepressant adverse-effect considerations plus licensed paroxetine monograph.

OCD-ESCITALOPRAM-QT.citation: Licensed escitalopram monograph and local QT-risk guidance; high-dose OCD use requires specialist review.

OCD-ANTIPSYCHOTIC-AUGMENT.citation: NICE CG31 specialist poor-response pathway; Osser DN (2020), OCD aripiprazole/risperidone augmentation node.

OCD-ANTIPSYCHOTIC-TRIAL.citation: Osser DN. Psychopharmacology Algorithms (2020), time-limited low-dose antipsychotic augmentation discussion; local metabolic/EPS guidance.

OCD-EXPERIMENTAL-LATER.citation: Osser DN. Psychopharmacology Algorithms (2020), refractory OCD experimental augmentation nodes.

OCD-EXPERIMENTAL-WEAK.citation: NICE CG31 multidisciplinary specialist review for refractory OCD; local evidence review required.

CAT-LORAZEPAM-FIRSTLINE.citation: British Association for Psychopharmacology. Evidence-based consensus guidelines for the management of catatonia. J Psychopharmacol. 2023. doi:10.1177/02698811231158232.

CAT-LORAZEPAM-CHALLENGE.citation: BAP catatonia guideline (2023), lorazepam challenge protocol and response assessment. doi:10.1177/02698811231158232.

CAT-LORAZEPAM-TAPER.citation: BAP catatonia guideline (2023), benzodiazepine discontinuation and relapse recommendations. doi:10.1177/02698811231158232.

CAT-LORAZEPAM-RESPONSE.citation: BAP catatonia guideline (2023), benzodiazepine response, continuation and taper recommendations. doi:10.1177/02698811231158232.

CAT-LORAZEPAM-RESPIRATORY.citation: BAP catatonia guideline (2023) and licensed lorazepam monograph; local respiratory-monitoring policy required.

CAT-NMDA-LATER.citation: BAP catatonia guideline (2023), recommendations for amantadine or memantine after unavailable, contraindicated, ineffective or partially effective first-line treatment.

CAT-NMDA-EVIDENCE.citation: BAP catatonia guideline (2023), NMDA-antagonist evidence review. doi:10.1177/02698811231158232.

CAT-NMS-SEVERE.citation: BAP catatonia guideline (2023), severe neuroleptic malignant syndrome recommendations.

CAT-NMS-DOPAMINE-AGONIST.citation: BAP catatonia guideline (2023), bromocriptine or amantadine in moderate/severe NMS.

CAT-NMS-DANTROLENE.citation: BAP catatonia guideline (2023), dantrolene in severe NMS.

CAT-NMS-AMANTADINE.citation: BAP catatonia guideline (2023), amantadine in moderate/severe NMS.

CAT-CLOZAPINE-WITHDRAWAL.citation: BAP catatonia guideline (2023), clozapine-withdrawal catatonia recommendations.

CAT-CHRONIC-CLOZAPINE.citation: BAP catatonia guideline (2023), chronic mild catatonia in schizophrenia and clozapine.

CAT-PERIODIC-NOT-ACUTE.citation: BAP catatonia guideline (2023), periodic catatonia acute treatment and prophylaxis distinction.

ASD-NONPHARM-FIRST.citation: NICE CG170 Autism spectrum disorder in under 19s: support and management; AACAP Practice Parameter for ASD (2014); Subramanyam et al. Clinical Practice Guidelines for Autism Spectrum Disorders (2019).

ASD-IRRITABILITY-ANTIPSYCHOTIC.citation: AACAP Practice Parameter for ASD (2014); Fung et al. Pharmacologic treatment of severe irritability and problem behaviors in autism, Pediatrics 2016; NICE CG170 challenging behaviour medication recommendations.

ASD-ANTIPSYCHOTIC-MONITOR.citation: NICE CG170 recommendations for antipsychotic use in autistic children with behaviour that challenges; licensed risperidone/aripiprazole monographs.

ASD-IRRITABILITY-ALPHA2.citation: Subramanyam et al. Clinical Practice Guidelines for Autism Spectrum Disorders (2019), target-symptom pharmacotherapy figure; Lurie Center proposal for co-occurring symptoms in ASD (BMC Medicine 2025).

ASD-ADHD-ALPHA2.citation: Lurie Center proposal for pharmacological treatment of co-occurring symptoms in ASD (BMC Medicine 2025); ASD child/adolescent CPG 2019 target-symptom algorithm.

ASD-ADHD-ATOMOXETINE.citation: ASD child/adolescent CPG 2019 pharmacotherapy update; Lurie Center ASD pharmacology proposal (BMC Medicine 2025).

ASD-ADHD-STIMULANT.citation: AACAP Practice Parameter for ASD (2014) and ASD child/adolescent CPG 2019: methylphenidate evidence for ADHD symptoms in ASD.

ASD-STIMULANT-TOLERABILITY.citation: ASD child/adolescent CPG 2019 adverse-effect table; licensed methylphenidate monograph.

ASD-ANXIETY-BUSPIRONE-MIRTAZAPINE.citation: Lurie Center proposal for pharmacological treatment of anxiety in ASD (BMC Medicine 2025).

ASD-SSRI-ACTIVATION.citation: ASD child/adolescent CPG 2019 pharmacotherapy update and adverse-effect table; Lurie Center ASD pharmacology proposal (BMC Medicine 2025).

ASD-DEPRESSION-TARGETED.citation: Lurie Center proposal for depression treatment in ASD (BMC Medicine 2025); NICE CG170 coexisting mental health condition principles.

ASD-SLEEP-MELATONIN.citation: NICE CG170 sleep intervention pathway for autistic children; ASD child/adolescent CPG 2019 sleep section.

ASD-SLEEP-BEHAVIOURAL-FIRST.citation: NICE CG170 sleep intervention pathway for autistic children and young people.

ASD-PSYCHOSOCIAL-FIRST.citation: NICE CG170; AACAP Practice Parameter for ASD (2014); ASD child/adolescent CPG 2019 non-pharmacological approaches.

_meta.description: Maps each rule_id used by the engine to its supporting citation. Every entry is a PLACEHOLDER until a psychiatrist replaces it with a real, licensed guideline / drug-reference citation. The engine never invents citations; an unmapped rule simply carries no reference.

status_legend.placeholder: Needs a real citation before clinical use.
status_legend.verified: Citation reviewed and approved by a named clinician.
